design: 2 versions (YOLO11, YOLO26) x scales: YOLO11 {n,s,m}, YOLO26 {n,s}
spec_source: Ultralytics official COCO instance-segmentation tables; params/FLOPs/mask-mAP re-verified 2026-06-22
note_pretrained: All figures are COCO-pretrained reference specs, not final results. Final numbers come from fine-tuning all 5 on CrossguardVision after a real train/val/test split (today val==train).
note_speed: Published speeds are T4 GPU (TensorRT), NOT Raspberry Pi. Pi/CPU latency must be measured: batch=1, fixed imgsz, ~20 warmup + >=200 timed runs, report median + p95, split pre/infer/post, state precision.
metrics_to_report: Inference latency (ms) and FPS, measured on Raspberry Pi (batch=1)
metric_parity_note: All 5 are Ultralytics models scored identically -> directly comparable, no COCO/pycocotools conversion needed.
